title: Ubiquiti U-PoE++ Gigabit PoE injector, 48V / 1,25A (60W)
description: U-POE++ from Ubiquiti is a high-quality Gigabit PoE injector with one PoE output port for powering devices with voltage level of 48V with a maximum output power of 60W , which is sufficient for the energy-intensive devices. The power supply is conducted on all the wires 1,2,4.5 (+) and 3,6,7.8 (-). Of course, the source also includes protection against electrical overvoltage. A 3-pin power cord is included
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Output Power [W] 60 Pin powering 1,2,4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 48 Output Current [A] 1,25 Efficiency [%] 85+
